title: lgwks.context.packet.v1
description: The canonical daemon briefing (#122), promoted from lgwks.daemon.packet.v0. One shape read by every agent (Claude/Codex/Gemini) and the human cockpit. A derived, read-only projection reproducible from {event log @ watermark, stores @ watermark} with no hidden mutation. The v0 core (session_head/queue/recent_events/event_count) is preserved; the v1 sections (active_task/retrieval/known_failures/commitments/constraints/allowed_capabilities/provenance) are each an independent builder and may ship empty-but-shaped — the section set is locked, so filling a stub later is additive (no schema bump, no consumer refactor). retrieval is fed by #124; allowed_capabilities by #120; recent_events are #118 v2 events.

retrieval.description: relevant graph+vector hits via #124, each with cid+provenance+score

allowed_capabilities.description: #120 verbs permitted given the session's authority
